Synthetic Example Corporation

Quarterly report for the fiscal quarter ended March 31, 2026. This document is a synthetic test fixture.

Part I. Financial Information

Item 1. Financial Statements

Revenue for the quarter was $1,250 million, an increase over the prior-year quarter.

Restructuring charges of $450 thousand were recorded as a loss in the period.

Item 2. Management’s Discussion and Analysis

Total assets were $8,400 million as of March 31, 2026.

Widget segment revenue was $700 million.

As discussed in Item 1, revenue of $1,250 million is presented again here.

Part II. Other Information

Weighted average basic shares outstanding were 120,000 thousand.
